values.title: Quality

about.subtitle2: Since 2001, we have helped companies across many sectors improve their infrastructure, protect their systems and move forward with their digital transformation — with a close, professional and personalised approach.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: We answer the most common questions. If you can't find what you're looking for, write to us.

items.q: Do you only work in Madrid or across Spain?
items.a: Our headquarters are in Madrid, where we offer both on-site and remote service. For the rest of Spain, we work remotely with the same quality and response time.

items.q: Do you offer both on-site and remote support?
items.a: Yes. We adapt the service mode to each client: remote access for common incidents and on-site when the situation requires it.

items.q: Do you work with small SMEs?
items.a: Yes. SMEs are our main clients. No company is too small if it has real technology needs.

items.q: Can you act as an external IT department?
items.a: Yes. Many of our clients don't have an internal IT department. We take on that role, either fully or partially, based on each organization's needs.
Yes. We analyze the company's security posture, identify vulnerabilities and propose corrective and preventive measures tailored to each case.

items.q: Do you install routers, WiFi repeaters and business networks?
items.a: Yes. We design, install and maintain professional network infrastructures, including WiFi, cabling, network electronics and telecommunications.

items.q: Do you offer ongoing IT maintenance?
items.a: Yes. We offer preventive and corrective maintenance, monitoring and incident management to keep your business running.
Yes. We develop software, applications and digital solutions adapted to the real processes of each company, including APIs and integrations.

items.q: Can you improve an old website?
items.a: Yes. We redesign, optimize or rebuild corporate websites focused on performance, security, SEO and user experience.

items.q: Do you work with hotels, restaurants, schools and law firms?
items.a: Yes. We have experience in multiple sectors: hospitality, education, professional firms, agencies, retail and service companies.

items.q: What sets Onilusion apart from other IT companies?
items.a: Real personalization. We don't sell closed packages. We listen, analyze and design specific solutions for each client. We've been doing it for over two decades.

items.q: How do I request a quote?
items.a: You can contact us via form, email or phone. Tell us your situation, we'll analyze it and present a proposal tailored to your needs and budget.

services.title: Comprehensive technology services for SMEs and businesses
services.subtitle: From consulting to development, cybersecurity and infrastructure: all in one technology partner.
services.cta: Don't see what you need? Tell us your case

categories.title: IT & technology consulting
categories.desc: We analyse your technology landscape and guide you towards the right decisions for your business.

landing.h1: IT consulting for businesses in Madrid
landing.meta_title: IT Consulting Madrid — Technology advisory for businesses | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: IT consulting and advisory for SMEs and businesses in Madrid and across Spain. IT planning, systems optimisation and outsourced IT department.
landing.intro: Good technology decisions save money and prevent problems. We analyse your company's real situation — systems, processes and goals — and guide you with independent technical judgement, like an external IT department working alongside you from Madrid for all of Spain.
benefits: Decisions based on a real analysis of your company, not standard packages
A stable technical contact who knows your business and speaks your language
IT planning with clear costs and defined priorities

faqs.q: What does Onilusion's IT consulting include?
faqs.a: Technology assessment, IT planning, systems optimisation and ongoing support. We can act as a complete external IT department or support your in-house team.

faqs.q: Do you work with companies that already have their own IT staff?
faqs.a: Yes. We complement internal teams with specialised advice, technical second opinions and support on specific projects.

categories.title: Cybersecurity
categories.desc: We protect your business against current threats with a preventive, proactive strategy.

landing.h1: Cybersecurity for SMEs and businesses in Madrid
landing.meta_title: Business Cybersecurity Madrid — Protection and audits | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: Protection of systems, data and corporate networks for SMEs and businesses in Madrid and across Spain. Security audits, ransomware prevention and secure communications.
landing.intro: Cyberattacks increasingly target SMEs, precisely because they tend to be less protected. We build security into your infrastructure with a preventive approach — audit, protect and maintain — adapted to your company's size and real risk.
benefits: Preventive approach: we detect vulnerabilities before they become incidents
Measures proportionate to your size and budget, without oversizing
GDPR-aligned protection for your data and your clients' data

faqs.q: Where do you start when protecting a company?
faqs.a: With a security audit: we review systems, networks, backups and access, and prioritise measures according to risk and budget.

faqs.q: Is cybersecurity only for large companies?
faqs.a: No. SMEs are now a frequent target because they usually have less protection. We adapt the measures to each company size.

categories.title: IT infrastructure & maintenance
categories.desc: Your infrastructure always up and running. We design, deploy and maintain robust infrastructures with fast, preventive and corrective support.

landing.h1: IT maintenance for businesses in Madrid
landing.meta_title: IT Maintenance Madrid — Business IT support | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: Preventive and corrective IT maintenance for SMEs and businesses. Remote support across Spain and on-site in Madrid; servers, networks and equipment management.
landing.intro: Technology working every single day is no accident: it's maintenance. We look after your equipment, servers and networks with preventive and corrective support — remote across Spain and on-site in Madrid — so your business never stops because of an IT incident.
benefits: Fast response: immediate remote support, on-site in Madrid when needed
Preventive maintenance that reduces breakdowns and surprises
A single provider for equipment, servers, networks and backups

faqs.q: Do you offer maintenance plans with a monthly fee?
faqs.a: Yes. We design maintenance plans adapted to each company's size and needs, with clear scope and costs.

faqs.q: How quickly do you respond to an incident?
faqs.a: Most incidents are resolved quickly by remote support. When physical presence is needed, we travel to you; our headquarters are in Madrid.

categories.title: Telecommunications & connectivity
categories.desc: Professional, stable connectivity so your business never loses communication.

landing.meta_title: Business Telecommunications Madrid — IP telephony and WiFi networks | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: IP telephony, business networks, routers, WiFi repeaters and antennas for companies in Madrid and across Spain. Stable, secure professional connectivity.
landing.intro: Without connectivity there is no business. We design and install business networks, IP telephony and professional WiFi so your communications are stable, secure and grow with you: from a single office to distributed sites, hotels or schools.
benefits: Networks designed for your real space: WiFi coverage without dead zones
Flexible IP telephony: extensions, forwarding and remote work without costly switchboards
Professional network electronics installed and maintained by the same team

faqs.q: Do you install repeaters and WiFi networks in large premises?
faqs.a: Yes. We study the space and design the coverage with the access points, repeaters or antennas needed for a stable signal throughout.

faqs.q: What are the advantages of IP telephony for an SME?
faqs.a: It reduces costs, lets you work from anywhere with your office extension and scales easily as the team grows.

categories.title: Cloud & business software
categories.desc: Unlock the potential of the cloud with solutions adapted to your business.

landing.h1: Cloud solutions and online ERP for businesses
landing.meta_title: Business Cloud Solutions — Cloud migration and online ERP | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: Cloud migration, online ERP and business management software for SMEs. Deployment and support from Madrid for all of Spain.
landing.intro: A well-deployed cloud means working from anywhere, paying for what you use and never losing data. We guide you through cloud migration and the deployment of online ERP and management software, with an orderly transition that never halts your activity.
benefits: Planned migration: no data loss and no downtime
Secure access to your business from the office, home or any site
Management software adapted to your processes, not the other way round

faqs.q: Is it safe to move my company to the cloud?
faqs.a: Properly deployed, the cloud offers backups, encryption and access control that are hard to match with local servers. We design the migration with security as the priority.

faqs.q: What is an online ERP and what is it for?
faqs.a: It's management software (invoicing, purchasing, warehouse, accounting…) accessible from the browser. It centralises information and eliminates scattered spreadsheets.

categories.title: Development & digitalisation
categories.desc: Software, websites and integrations built around your company's real processes.

landing.h1: Custom software and web development in Madrid
landing.meta_title: Custom Software Development Madrid — Web, APIs and integrations | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: Custom software development, corporate websites, APIs and integrations for businesses in Madrid and across Spain. Digitalisation adapted to your real processes.
landing.intro: When standard software falls short, we build it custom. We develop applications, corporate websites, APIs and integrations that adapt to your company's real processes — and automate them so your team spends time on what matters.
benefits: Software that adapts to the way you work, not the other way round
Integrations that connect your tools and eliminate duplicate work
Close development: you talk directly to the people building your project

faqs.a: Yes. We design and develop modern corporate websites that are fast, secure and search-engine optimised, as a professional showcase for your company.

faqs.q: Can you connect programs I already use?
faqs.a: Yes. We develop APIs and integrations so your tools share data automatically: invoicing, CRM, warehouse, web…

categories.title: Hardware & technology equipment
categories.desc: Supply and installation of technology equipment for businesses of all sizes.

landing.meta_title: Business IT Equipment — Computers, servers and POS | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: Supply and installation of computers, servers, POS terminals, screens and network equipment for businesses in Madrid and across Spain, with setup and support included.
landing.intro: Buying technology without expertise is expensive. We supply and install the equipment your company needs — computers, servers, POS terminals, screens, network electronics — chosen with technical judgement, configured and ready to work from day one.
benefits: Equipment selected with technical judgement for its real intended use
Delivery, installation and configuration included: switch on and work
After-sales support from the same team that installed it

faqs.q: Which brands do you work with?
faqs.a: We work with leading manufacturers such as Dell, HP, Cisco, Fortinet and Synology, choosing in each case the equipment that best fits the need and budget.

faqs.q: Do you install POS terminals for retail and hospitality?
faqs.a: Yes. We supply and install point-of-sale terminals for shops, restaurants and hotels, integrated with their management software.

categories.title: IT audits
categories.desc: Complete technical assessment of systems, networks and processes to improve security, performance and decision-making.

landing.meta_title: IT Audit Madrid — Systems and security assessment | Onilusion S.A.
landing.meta_desc: IT audits for businesses: technical assessment of systems, networks and security with a detailed report and improvement plan. Madrid and all of Spain.
landing.intro: Do you really know the state of your infrastructure? An IT audit gives you an objective picture: what works, what is at risk and what should improve, with a clear report and an action plan prioritised by impact and cost.
benefits: An objective, independent picture of the real state of your systems
A clear, understandable report without unnecessary jargon
An improvement plan prioritised by risk, impact and cost

faqs.q: What does an IT audit review?
faqs.a: Infrastructure, networks, security, backups, access and processes. The scope adapts to each company and its specific concerns.

faqs.q: Does the audit oblige me to hire you for the changes?
faqs.a: No. The report is yours and you can implement it with whoever you choose. If you want us to do it, we present a separate proposal.

about.title: Over two decades as the technology partner for Spanish businesses
about.subtitle: Family company. High professional standards. Personal approach. Real personalization.
about.mission_text: We believe technology should serve people and businesses. Our mission is to offer personalized, close and professional technology solutions, adapted to the real needs of each client. We work in a family environment where we care for both our clients and our team.
about.diff_text: We don't sell standard solutions. Every client is different. Every company has unique needs, processes, challenges and objectives. Onilusion analyzes each case and creates solutions tailored to each client.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about our technology services
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about how we work, what services we offer and how we can help you.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.name: Onilusion S.A.
legal.activity: Provision of consulting, advisory and advertising services in informatics, electronics and telecommunications, as well as research and development of computer applications and systems.

sections.p: Accessing and using this website grants the status of user and implies acceptance of these terms. Users agree to make appropriate use of the content and not to use it for unlawful activities or against good faith.

The contents of this website (texts, images, logos, design and code) are owned by Onilusion S.A. or by third parties who have authorised their use, and are protected by intellectual and industrial property law. Reproduction without express authorisation is prohibited.

Onilusion S.A. is not liable for damages arising from improper use of this website or for the content of third-party sites linked from it. We work to keep the information up to date and accurate, without guaranteeing the complete absence of errors.
These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of Madrid, unless applicable regulations provide otherwise.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information about the processing of your personal data

sections.p: Onilusion S.A., VAT ID A82874603, registered at Calle Doctor Esquerdo, 105, 28007 Madrid (Spain). Email: info@onilusion.com. Phone: +34 914 009 634.
Data provided through the contact form is processed to handle your enquiry or quote request and to manage any resulting business relationship. No automated decision-making or profiling takes place.
The legal basis for processing is the data subject's consent (art. 6.1.a GDPR), given by ticking the acceptance box on the form, and the legitimate interest in responding to enquiries received.
Data is kept for as long as necessary to handle your request and, thereafter, for the legally required periods.
Data is not shared with third parties except where legally required. No international data transfers take place.

You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing and portability by writing to info@onilusion.com, providing proof of identity. You may also lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information about the cookies we use

sections.p: Cookies are small files stored on your device when you visit a website, allowing it to remember information about your visit, such as language or preferences.

This site only uses cookies and technical storage necessary for its operation: your language preference and your decision regarding cookie use. We do not use advertising cookies. If analytics cookies are added in the future, they will only be activated with your prior consent.
You can accept or reject non-essential cookies from the settings banner. You can also delete or block cookies from your browser settings at any time.
This policy may be updated to reflect regulatory or technical changes. We recommend reviewing it periodically.
